entries.summary: Phase 09 Facebook Messenger Channel hoàn thành. Toàn bộ luồng end-to-end hoạt động: khách nhắn FB → webhook → AI reply → gửi lại FB. Nhân viên có thể reply trực tiếp qua CMS và bàn giao lại cho bot.
project_changes: BE: Channel module mới (7 files) — adapter pattern, webhook, service, controller
BE: Facebook adapter — normalize incoming + sendReply via Graph API (Bearer auth)
BE: Webhook controller — HMAC-SHA256 + timingSafeEqual verification
BE: Message routing — page_id → tenant → agent → pipeline → reply
BE: sendHumanReplyToChannel — forward human agent messages to Facebook Messenger
BE: handoverToBot endpoint + SYSTEM audit message
BE: OnModuleDestroy for dedup interval cleanup
FE: handoverToBot API + store action + CustomerPanel button + page handler

commits.message: feat: Phase 09 — Facebook Channel + security fixes + handover-to-bot
docs: update plans — Phase 09 Facebook Channel done, 9/11 phases complete

decisions: In-memory Map for dedup (MVP) — sẽ cần Redis khi multi-instance
FB access token lưu plain text (MVP) — encrypt AES-256 ở Phase 10
Fire-and-forget pattern cho sendHumanReplyToChannel (không block response)
SYSTEM message audit trail khi handover to bot
next_steps: Phase 10: Self-serve API & Polish — encrypt tokens, rate limiting, error UX
FE: Real-time updates cho CRM (polling MVP hoặc WebSocket)
Test thêm edge cases: quota hết, LLM lỗi, FB token expired
open_questions: Cần encrypt FB access token khi nào? Phase 10 hay sớm hơn?
Có cần FE trang quản lý Channel connections không?
